topics: Role/responsibility of Quantity surveyor at various stages of construction Estimate-Details required

Contract documents (Brief description only) Bill of Quantity -Typical format-use Item of works- Identify various item of work from the drawings-units of measurement of various materials and works (focus may give to RCC residential building) General rule & method of measurement with reference to Indian Standard Specifications-IS1200

Introduction to the use of CPWD schedule of rates as per latest DSR and Analysis of rate as per latest DAR Specifications-General specification of all items of a residential building. Detailed specifications (CPWD specifications) of major item of work like Earth work excavation in foundation
finishing of building work Analysis of rates for Earth work in excavation for foundation
flooring with reference to latest DSR and latest DAR (Data should be given

Detailed Estimate- Preparation of detailed measurement using Centre line method & Short wall long wall (separate wall) method for RCC single-storied building (Flat roof) including stair cabin- Residential/office/school building. BOQ preparation of a single-storied RCC building work. Material quantity calculation of the items of work (Rubble
Plastering) in detailed estimate prepared for building work. (Data for unit quantity should be provided from DAR) Bar Bending Schedule- Preparation of BBS of RCC beams
Retaining wall. Road estimation-Estimation of earthwork from longitudinal section-metaled road. Estimation of sanitary and water supply work -Water tank
Manhole (No Detailed estimate needed- concept of item of work
its general specification and unit of measurement). Introduction to software tools for quantity surveying
kinds of values Income- Gross income
obsolescence -Free hold and leasehold properties. Methods of calculating depreciation - straight line method - constant percentage method
sinking fund method and quantity survey method. Methods of valuation - rental method
depreciation method. Valuation of land (Brief description only
